slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — perfect for deep work. Top priority: make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evaluations design doc (AE-1079), your only active Jira ticket. Second priority: flag IT to fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials — you currently have zero visibility into escalations and product metrics. You have 0 meetings today.
